resources.string: Please update Android System WebView to version %1$d or newer.
Super Productivity could not start Android System WebView.

This is not an outdated WebView version. Android reports WebView provider details, but the provider fails to start. This is most often fixed by resetting the active WebView provider app: open the provider app settings below, then tap Storage → Clear storage and reopen Super Productivity. Updating Android System WebView or switching away from a beta provider can also help. Clearing provider storage does not delete your Super Productivity tasks, but it may affect that provider app\'s own browser or app data. Exporting a backup first is a sensible precaution.

This is not an outdated WebView version warning. Android could not start WebView before provider details were available. This is most often fixed by resetting the WebView provider app: open the provider app settings below, then tap Storage → Clear storage and reopen Super Productivity. Updating Android System WebView or switching away from a beta provider can also help. Clearing provider storage does not delete your Super Productivity tasks, but it may affect that provider app\'s own browser or app data. Exporting a backup first is a sensible precaution.

Android may show options such as removing WebView updates. Removing updates can clear WebView storage on some devices. Continue only if you have exported or backed up your Super Productivity data; synced data may still require reconnecting accounts and local unsynced changes may be lost.

This opens the active WebView provider app settings. There, tap Storage → Clear storage, then reopen Super Productivity.\n\nYour Super Productivity tasks are stored separately and will not be deleted, but clearing storage may affect that provider app\'s own browser or app data. Export a backup first if you can.

Your Android System WebView appears to be older than version %1$d.

If the version reported above is correct, continuing may cause:
• The app to crash or fail to load
• Data to render incorrectly or not at all
• Sync errors and possible data loss

Version detection is occasionally wrong on certain devices. If you are sure your WebView is up to date, you can continue — but please update Android System WebView from the Play Store first whenever possible.
Shows today\'s tasks with quick done action
